top_signals.title: US launches strikes on Iran after Tehran attacks container ship
top_signals.summary: Washington says ‘unwarranted aggression against commercial shipping’ violated ceasefire between adversaries
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Venezuela earthquake death toll climbs amid anger over slow response
top_signals.summary: Country’s US-backed interim leader Delcy Rodríguez accused of failing to provide help for the victims
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Oracle stock has worst week since 2001 dot-com bust as AI financing concerns escalate
top_signals.summary: Oracle's surging spending, negative free cash flow and $130 billion debt pile are weighing on the stock.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
